mapper.select:
select fieldid as id, fieldchinesename || '(' || fieldid || ')' as value, sameid as sameId, '' as name from synlte.synltefield where fieldid is not null and gadsj_fieldid is not null and upper(substr(fieldid, 0, 3)) != 'WBZ' and STATUS = '05' and field_standard != '99'
and (upper(fieldid) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) or upper(fieldchinesename) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) )

select distinct s.codeid as id, d.codetext || '(' || s.codeid || ')' as value, '' as sameId, '' as name from synlte.synltefield s left join (select codeid, CODETEXT from synlte.fieldcode) d on s.codeid = d.codeid where fieldid NOT like 'WB%' and s.codeid is not null and d.codetext is not null
and upper(d.codetext) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%')))

select value, label from(select distinct STATUS as value, 'status' as label from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where status is not null order by STATUS asc) t union all select value, label from (select distinct FIELD_CLASS as value, 'fieldClass' as label from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where FIELD_CLASS is not null order by FIELD_CLASS asc) t union all select VALUE, label FROM (select distinct SECRET_CLASS as value, 'securityLevel' as label from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where SECRET_CLASS is not null order by SECRET_CLASS asc) t

select distinct name from( select distinct FIELDCHINESENAME as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(FIELDCHINESENAME) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
union all select distinct FIELDNAME as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(FIELDNAME) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
union all select distinct SIM_CHINESE as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(SIM_CHINESE) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
union all select distinct FIELDID as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(FIELDID) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
) t
mapper.update:
update synlte.SYNLTEFIELD set COLUMNNAME = upper(#{columnName}), FIELDNAME = upper(#{fieldName}), FIELDCHINESENAME = #{fieldChineseName}, FIELDDESCRIBE = #{fieldDescribe}, FIELDTYPE = #{fieldType}, FIELDLEN = #{fieldLen}, DEFAULTVALUE = #{defaultValue}, MEMO = #{memo, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, CODEID = #{codeId}, SAMEID = #{sameId}, VERSIONS = #{versions}, Releasedate = #{releaseDate, jdbcType = INTEGER}, FULL_CHINSEE = #{fullChinese}, SIM_CHINESE = #{simChinese}, SYNONY_NAME = #{synonyName}, OBJECT_TYPE = #{objectType}, EXPRESSION_WORD = #{expressionWord}, CODEID_DETAIL = #{codeIdDetail}, ISNORMAL = #{isNorMal}, RELATE = #{relate}, UNIT = #{unit}, FUSE_TYPE = #{fuseType}, FUSE_FIELDID = #{fuseFieldId}, STATUS = #{statusNum}, SUB_ORG = #{subOrg}, SUB_AUTHOR = #{subAuthor}, ON_DATE = #{onDate}, REG_ORG = #{regOrg}, FIELD_CLASS = #{fieldClass}, SECRET_CLASS = #{secretClass}, FIELD_STANDARD = #{fieldStandard}, ATTRIBUTE_WORD = #{attributeWord, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, FACTURER = #{facturer}, context = #{context}, constraint = #{constraint}, UPDATETIME = NOW(), UPDATER = #{updater}, FIELD_RELATES = #{fieldRelates, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId})
and Releasedate is null
mapper.select:
select fieldid as value, fieldchinesename as label, gadsj_fieldId as memo from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID,0,3)) != 'WBZ' and STATUS='05' and field_standard != '99'
and fieldid = #{fieldId}
and field_standard = '2'
and field_standard = '3'
and ( (upper(fieldchinesename) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(FIELDID) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(fieldname) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) )

select FIELDCHINESENAME as label, FIELDID as value, fieldname as memo from synlte.synltefield
FIELDID is not null and GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID, 0, 3)) != 'WBZ' and STATUS = '05' and field_standard != '99'
and ( (upper(FIELDCHINESENAME) like upper(concat('%', concat(#{searchText}, '%')))) or (upper(fieldId) like upper(concat('%', concat(#{searchText}, '%')))) )

select codetext as codeText, codeid as codeid, field_class as fieldClassId, valtext as fieldClassCh, m.WORDNAME as sameWordType, fieldid as fieldId from (select s.field_class, e.codetext, e.codeid, b.valtext, s.sameid, s.fieldid from (SELECT CODEID, field_class, sameid, fieldid FROM synlte.SYNLTEFIELD ) s LEFT JOIN synlte.FIELDCODE e on s.codeid = e.codeid left join (select CODETEXT as valtext, CODEID as valvalue from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414' union select VALTEXT as valtext, VALVALUE as valvalue from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid in (select codeid from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414')) b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) a left join synlte.sameword m on a.sameid = m.sameid

select fieldid as value, fieldchinesename as label, gadsj_fieldId as memo from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID, 0, 3)) != 'WBZ' and STATUS = '05' and field_standard != '99'
